data.body: AC amendment: The RED test assertion must be dual-sided to prevent false GREEN on partial fixes: (1) POSITIVE: assert output contains 'See INSTALL.md' (the expected final string); (2) NEGATIVE: assert output does NOT contain 'docs/INSTALL.md' (specifically the old path pattern). Both assertions must be included in test_setup_references_root_install_doc. Example: if grep -q 'docs/INSTALL\.md' <<< ""; then FAIL++; else PASS++; fi — and a matching positive assert. This guards against partial fixes like changing 'docs/INSTALL.md' to './docs/INSTALL.md' (still wrong).
